notes: Implementation fully covers requirements. Multi-stage Dockerfiles implemented for both API (FastAPI with python:3.11-slim) and Web (Next.js with node:20-alpine). All 6 services configured in docker-compose.yml (postgres, redis, minio, api, web, nginx). Health checks properly configured at service level in docker-compose.yml using 127.0.0.1 instead of localhost (IPv6 fix applied in commit 9f5b942). JSON structured logging via nginx map directive. Secrets management via environment variables (JWT_SECRET_KEY required). Resource limits set for all services. Build verification passed (docker compose config --services, docker compose build --parallel, docker compose config).
